hero.title: Modern mountaineering with a clear, calm approach.
hero.subtitle: Expedition leadership, alpine education, and high-altitude storytelling from the world’s most demanding ranges.

intro.headline: Guiding climbers with precision, respect, and responsibility.
intro.description: From logistics to summit strategy, every expedition is built on safety, preparation, and a deep respect for the mountain. Debasish supports climbers and teams with clear decision-making and alpine education.

featuredStories.title: K2 Winter Ridge Strategy
featuredStories.excerpt: A technical push on a narrow weather window with a small, fast-moving team.

featuredStories.title: Everest Summit Window
featuredStories.excerpt: How we navigated crowd management, oxygen strategy, and a late-season summit bid.

featuredStories.title: Patagonia Icefield Traverse
featuredStories.excerpt: A five-day traverse of blue-ice corridors with whiteout navigation drills.

featuredVideos.description: A concise breakdown of reading a weather window above 7,000m.
